sub_pixel_system.notes: Not applicable - tactical RPG with grid-based movement

special_mechanics.name: Grid-Based Turn Movement
special_mechanics.description: Characters move on a square grid, each occupying a single square. Movement is turn-based rather than real-time

special_mechanics.name: Free Roaming Exploration
special_mechanics.description: Outside of combat, player can explore towns and locales with free movement

tier_notes: Tier 1 designation appears to be a metadata error. This is a tactical RPG with no real-time character movement physics. Movement is grid-based and turn-based. No sub-pixel system, gravity, jump physics, or acceleration/deceleration data exists for this game paradigm. Sources contain only gameplay mechanics and narrative content, not physics parameters.
